# ID-24: Worktree collapse + track migration (B3 ratification)

**RE-SCOPED kh-S260:** The worktree collapse executed off-spec at S71 close via fast-forward alias (origin/main = origin/production-readiness = origin/content-items-investigation at b7eca35e/2cf250b6) rather than the planned per-worktree merge waves. The S71 E1+E2 merges already folded all in-flight work (incl ID-9/ID-20 output) into main. This Task is reduced from a 4-subtask spec-chain to a thin ratification + cleanup list (subtasks 24.1-24.7); the original spec-chain plan is retained below as historical context. Dependency gate [9,20] is spent. DEFERRED execution this session per Liam (populate-only).

---

**[Historical — original plan]** Collapse the four current long-lived worktrees (main / production-readiness / kh-knowledge-platform / ast-dataflow) back to main over 3-4 sessions per Liam-controlled merge timing, per B3 ratification at `docs/plans/phase-0-investigation/kh-sdlc-workflow.md` §9.3 + s48-feedback.md.

Post-collapse, future work uses TM-tracked Tasks → feature branches off main → worktree-isolated Executor dispatch (the §3.3 + §3.4 lifecycle). Per-track primers (`docs/tracks/*.md`) retire as each track merges; any surviving context promotes to CLAUDE.md or to per-Task `description` fields.

## Acceptance criteria

- All four worktrees merged or retired.
- `git worktree list` shows main only (or main + transient feature worktrees).
- `docs/tracks/*.md` files deleted or archived.
- CLAUDE.md `Parallel Tracks` section rewritten to reflect post-collapse single-track model.
- `docs/reference/state-of-the-product.md` updated.

## Dependencies

Each worktree's in-flight work needs to land first. Production-readiness must complete ID-9 (Astro docs-site) and ID-20 (per-Task mirror) before its collapse. Liam owns sequencing.
